creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
I couldn't fetch the distfiles. Do you think you can find an alternative mirror?

root@portjail:/usr/ports/games/inform # distilator .
500 [DISTFILE]  ftp://ftp.ifarchive.org/if-archive/infocom/compilers/inform6/manuals/designers_manual_4.zip
500 [DISTFILE]  ftp://ftp.ifarchive.org/if-archive/infocom/compilers/inform6/library/inform_library611.zip
500 [DISTFILE]  ftp://ftp.ifarchive.org/if-archive/infocom/compilers/inform6/source/inform632_source.zip
root@portjail:/usr/ports/games/inform # make fetch
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
=> inform632_source.zip doesn't seem to exist in /usr/distfiles/inform.
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.ifarchive.org/if-archive/infocom/compilers/inform6/source/inform632_source.zip
fetch: ftp://ftp.ifarchive.org/if-archive/infocom/compilers/inform6/source/inform632_source.zip: Service not available, closing control connection
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/inform/inform632_source.zip
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/inform/inform632_source.zip: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/distfiles/inform and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/games/inform.
